title: 151 Products TT1005-36 Tape, Clear
features: HIGH QUALITY GENERAL PURPOSE: 151 Hook & Loop Tape, holds securely and permanently, re-useable hook & loop system. Ideal for home, office, car, craft and workshop use.

QUICK & EASY TO USE: 151 Hook & Loop Tape, quick, easy and ready to use, no adhesive/glue spillage, safe for a wide range of uses. Simply measure required length and cut, peel to reveal adhesive side and apply.

GET CREATIVE, SEW OR STICK: 151 Hook & Loop Tape, versatile tape, suitable for indoor use. Use to affix products to a wide range of surfaces. This tape is adhesive, if using on fabric, hand sew after application if the item is to be washed.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use hook & loop tape, 1Metre
